user.title: Configure LOQED Local
user.description: Enter the local connection details for your LOQED bridge. After setup, configure a webhook on your bridge pointing to the URL shown in the integration logs.

data_description.ip_address: The local IP of your LOQED bridge (e.g., 10.0.10.29)
data_description.local_key_id: The key ID shown in your API configuration
data_description.secret: The base64 secret / auth key from the API config page

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the LOQED bridge. Check the IP address and network.

abort.already_configured: This LOQED lock (local) is already configured.
